parameters.jsonBody:
{
  "system_instruction": {
    "parts": [
      {
        "text": "AI LEAD-SCORING AGENT FOR LUMIÈRE STUDIO

You are a luxury photography studio lead-scoring agent for Lumière Studio in Lagos, Nigeria. Your goal is to evaluate incoming client enquiries and generate a personalized, warm response.

INPUT JSON:
{
  "name": string,
  "email": string,
  "sessionType": string,
  "budget": number,
  "preferredDate": string (ISO date),
  "urgency": string (within_2_weeks | within_month | within_3_months | flexible),
  "message": string
}

OUTPUT JSON (Return ONLY valid JSON):
{
  "score": number (1-10),
  "tier": "hot" | "warm" | "cold",
  "summary": string (one sentence summary of the lead),
  "reply": string (full personalized reply to the client)
}

TIER THRESHOLDS:
- hot: score 8-10
- warm: score 5-7
- cold: score 1-4

SCORING CRITERIA:
- sessionType is Wedding (+3)
- budget >= 300,000 (+2)
- urgency is 'within_2_weeks' or 'within_month' (+2)
- message is detailed, specific, and shows genuine intent (+2)
- preferredDate is provided (+1)

SCORE REDUCTION:
- budget < 85,000 (-2)
- message is vague, single sentence, or only asks for price (-2)
- urgency is 'flexible' AND no preferredDate provided (-1)
- sessionType is 'Other' with no additional explanation in message (-1)

REPLY RULES:
- Tone: Warm, friendly, and personal (not corporate).
- Reference the client's specific session type and their approximate budget.
- Invite them to the next step (e.g., a discovery call, a calendar link, or a personal reply).
- Sign off as "The Lumière Team".
- DO NOT mention the score, tier, or any internal assessment in the reply."
      }
    ]
  },
  "contents": [
    {
      "parts": [
        {
          "text": "{{ JSON.stringify($json.body) }}"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

parameters.subject: =🔴 HOT LEAD — {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.name }} · Score {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.score }}/10
parameters.body:
=

🔴 HOT LEAD RECEIVED

Name: {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.name }}

Email: {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.email }}

Session: {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.sessionType }}

Budget: ₦{{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.budget.toLocaleString() }}

Summary: {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.summary }}

Message: {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.message }}

View in Supabase

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "text": "🔴 *HOT LEAD* — *{{ $node[\"Parse AI Response\"].json.name }}* scored {{ $node[\"Parse AI Response\"].json.score }}/10\n{{ $node[\"Parse AI Response\"].json.sessionType }} · ₦{{ $node[\"Parse AI Response\"].json.budget.toLocaleString() }}\n{{ $node[\"Parse AI Response\"].json.summary }}" }

parameters.subject: =Re: Your Lumière Studio Enquiry, {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.name.split(' ')[0] }} ✨
We received your enquiry — Lumière Studio
parameters.body:
Dear {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.name }},

Thank you for reaching out to Lumière Studio. We have received your enquiry regarding a {{ $node["Parse AI Response"].json.sessionType }} session.

Our team is currently reviewing your request and we will be in touch shortly to discuss how we can bring your vision to life.

Warmly,
The Lumière Team
